rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL
fail_reason: 7 of 8 results clear sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7 thresholds; LLM-side primitive (composite multi-channel/side-tag/structural token embedding with hierarchy) is densely covered by ASIDE (2503.10566), structured token-dependency encoding (2501.18205), tabular categorical embeddings (2502.11596, 2508.01685), DECOR decomposed token composition (2509.10468), Instructional Segment Embedding (2410.09102), and Hierarchical Token Prepending (2511.14868). QUIPU-TOK's 5-channel summed side-tag embedding with hierarchical attachment is the same functional primitive as multiple existing works; no functional novelty.
